category_sources: source_facts.description says modern alternative to the watch command; official GitHub README describes hwatch as an alternative watch command that records command execution history and diffs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hwatch; official GitHub README uses hwatch.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation, usage, options, and feature documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/blacknon/hwatch, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify watch-command behavior, command output history, and diffs.
